text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data and improve over time without being explicitly programmed for every task. A more advanced form of this is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information in a way similar to the human brain. You encounter AI in daily life when you use voice assistants, get movie recommendations on streaming services, or rely on navigation apps for traffic updates. These systems learn from your behaviour to become more useful and accurate, making AI a powerful and growing part of modern technology.
